name: generate case with inner named scope
description: Code should include a generate case block containing a named scope with an inner symbol that is referenced from outside the module
snippet:
generate
  case (MODE)
    1: begin : g_scope
      logic inner_sig;
    end
  endcase
endgenerate

name: hierarchical XMR into generate case scope
description: Code should include a cross-module reference that traverses an instance hierarchy into a generate case named scope

name: multiple instance segments before generate scope
description: Code should include a hierarchical path with multiple nested instance segments preceding a generate case scope name

name: generate case with legalized label name
description: Code should include a generate case label that requires name legalization and contains a signal referenced hierarchically
snippet:
generate
  case (1'b1)
    default: begin : _1bad
      logic x;
    end
  endcase
endgenerate

name: generate case op alongside generate if op
description: Code should include both a generate case and a generate if block with named scopes to test consistent XMR path emission ordering
snippet:
generate
  if (COND) begin : g_if
    logic a;
  end
  case (MODE)
    0: begin : g_case
      logic b;
    end
  endcase
endgenerate
